cards.rules_text: At the beginning of your end step, exile an instant or sorcery card chosen at random from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it until the beginning of your next end step. If there are four or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, you may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.
Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Flying
When this creature enters, mill four cards. Then you may put an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard on top of your library.

When this enchantment enters, creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.
Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

[i](This creature has no creature types.)[/i]
{1}{WB}: This creature becomes white and black and its base power and toughness become 3/3.
{2}{W}{B}: If this creature is white it becomes a Cleric with lifelink and base power and toughness 5/5.
{2}{W}{W}{B}{B}: If this creature is a Cleric put three +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever you gain life this turn, each opponent loses that much life.

When this creature enters, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.
This creature and other creatures you control have base power and toughness equal to the number of creatures you control.
